prompt: A dual-arm tabletop manipulation scene viewed from above. Two black robot grippers operate over a white table with three blue plastic bins. The center bin contains many white circular objects and red rectangular packages, the left bin contains cylindrical mesh cups, and the right bin is mostly empty. Keep the camera viewpoint, table, bins, robot arms, and object identities consistent. The task is to use the right gripper to pick up one white circular object from the center bin and place it into the right blue bin, while the left gripper remains nearby and mostly stable.
frame_prompts: Initial frame: both robot grippers hover above the bins; the right gripper is near the right side of the center bin, and the left gripper is near the left bin.
The right gripper begins moving inward toward a white circular object in the center bin; the left gripper stays near its original pose.
The right gripper moves lower and closer above a target white circular object in the center bin.
The right gripper aligns its fingers around the target white circular object.
The right gripper lowers further and prepares to grasp the white circular object.
The right gripper closes around the white circular object inside the center bin.
The right gripper firmly grasps the white circular object; the object is still close to the stack in the center bin.
The right gripper starts lifting the grasped white circular object upward from the center bin.
The right gripper lifts the white circular object higher, clearly separating it from the other objects.
The right gripper carries the white circular object rightward toward the empty blue bin on the right.
The right gripper continues moving rightward across the table while holding the white circular object.
The right gripper reaches above the right blue bin, holding the white circular object over the bin.
The right gripper lowers the white circular object toward the inside of the right blue bin.
The right gripper positions the white circular object just above the bottom of the right blue bin.
The right gripper releases the white circular object into the right blue bin.
The white circular object rests inside the right blue bin; the right gripper opens and begins moving upward.
The right gripper lifts away from the placed white circular object inside the right blue bin.
The right gripper moves slightly back toward the center area after completing the placement.
The right gripper retreats further from the right blue bin, with the placed white circular object remaining inside.
Both robot grippers are again hovering above the bins; the white circular object remains placed in the right blue bin.
Final keyframe: the scene is stable, with one white circular object now in the right blue bin and the robot grippers hovering in a neutral pose.
